summary: Pre-registered candidate non-dome-cited INTERMAGNET stations: Manhay (MAB) 50.30°N 5.68°E Belgium; Dourbes (DOU) 50.10°N 4.60°E Belgium; Wingst (WNG) 53.74°N 9.07°E Germany; Surlari (SUA) 44.68°N 26.25°E Romania; Belsk (BEL) 51.84°N 20.79°E Poland. Set size frozen at 5; selection criteria (European mid-latitude, NOT in dome 9-station table, NASA obscuration > 30%) recorded in candidate_non_dome_intermagnet_stations block. OBS-O-03 now references this fixed list. Set is frozen by OTS anchor; any post-event revision requires separate dated addendum.
note_to_decider: Rev2 of EXP-283 addresses all six curmudgeon-flagged blockers (ISS-1801..1806) from queue_id=294 review. Recommend (a) close all six issues as fixed-by-revision, (b) re-route EXP-283 to curmudgeon for confirmation pass before OTS anchoring (revision_required=false in tracker, requires_frozen_prediction_review=true unchanged). Do NOT proceed to OTS anchoring until curmudgeon confirms rev2 closes the blockers.
